item.title: Behavioral and neural dysregulation to social rewards and links to internalizing symptoms in adolescents
item.description: Citation: Kwon, S-J., Ivory, S. L., McCormick, E. M., & Telzer, E. H. (2019). Behavioral and neural dysregulation to social rewards and links to internalizing symptoms in adolescents. Frontiers in Behavioral Neuroscience, 13, 158.

item.title: Not doomed to repeat: Enhanced mPFC tracking of errors promotes adaptive behavior during adolescence
item.description: Citation: McCormick, E. M., & Telzer, E. H. (2018). Not doomed to repeat: Enhanced mPFC tracking of errors promotes adaptive behavior during adolescence. Journal of Cognitive Neuroscience, 30(3), 281–289.

item.title: Youth's conceptions of adolescence predict longitudinal changes in prefrontal cortex activation and risk taking
item.description: Citation: Qu, Y., Pomerantz, E. M., McCormick, E. M., & Telzer, E. H. (2018). Youth’s conceptions of adolescence predict longitudinal changes in prefrontal cortex activation and risk taking. Child Development, 89, 773-783.

item.title: Activation in context: Differential conclusions drawn from cross-sectional and longitudinal analyses of adolescents’ cognitive control-related neural activity
item.description: Citation: McCormick, E. M., Qu, Y., & Telzer, E. H. (2017). Activation in context: Differential conclusions drawn from cross-sectional and longitudinal analyses of adolescents’ cognitive control-related neural activity. Frontiers in Human Neuroscience, 11, 141.

item.title: Adolescent neurodevelopment of cognitive control and risk-taking in negative family contexts
item.description: Citation: McCormick, E. M., Qu, Y., & Telzer, E. H. (2016). Adolescent neurodevelopment of cognitive control and risk-taking in negative family contexts. NeuroImage, 124, 989-996.
